claim_text: US nonfarm payroll employment increased by 172,000 in May 2026 and unemployment was 4.3%.
notes: Official BLS Employment Situation release; publication time 2026-06-05 08:30 ET.

claim_text: BLS revised March and April 2026 nonfarm payroll employment upward by a combined 93,000.
notes: Revisions matter because they strengthen the labor-market resilience signal relative to a cooling narrative.

claim_text: AP reported S&P 500 -2.6%, Nasdaq Composite -4.2%, and Dow -1.3% for 2026-06-05.
notes: Timestamped professional market report used as delayed/session-close quote source; direct exchange quote feed not retained.

claim_text: AP reported Treasury yields rose after the jobs report, with the 10-year yield near 4.76% from 4.68% and the 2-year yield near 4.23% from 4.11%.
notes: Rate levels are attributed to AP; use for market reaction, not as a primary Treasury source.

claim_text: Reuters-syndicated coverage attributed the selloff to chip weakness and jobs data fueling rate-hike fears.
notes: This is a market-causality interpretation, not proof of a single causal mechanism; treated as attribution plus cross-check.

claim_text: Axios reported Nasdaq -4.2%, Nvidia -6.2%, and PHLX Semiconductor Index down more than 10% on 2026-06-05.
notes: Used to characterize sector concentration and AI/semiconductor de-risking; should be refreshed against direct index/ETF data before actionability.

claim_text: Mira classifies the move as a sharp AI/semiconductor-led selloff and rate repricing, not a confirmed systemic crash.
notes: Judgment depends on absence of broader credit/liquidity stress evidence in current source stack; must refresh if breadth or credit indicators deteriorate.
